ksa_text: Design, build, validate, and document clinical trial databases in electronic data capture systems, including CRF specifications, edit check logic, user acceptance testing, and compliance documentation against study protocols and regulatory requirements.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Ensure design and development activities are properly documented (providing a functional description of implementation) and updated as necessary.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA RC-T-001 (Risk and Compliance/Task) scores 0.407 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.407) and is in_scope for the ISO 8000 Data Technician role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for technician-level ISO 8000 Data Technician.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Risk and Compliance) at composite 0.407. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for ISO 8000 Data Technician.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Risk and Compliance) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.407 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Risk and Compliance KSA (composite 0.407)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of ISO 8000 Data Technician job postings does not surface this Risk and Compliance competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Risk and Compliance) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.407 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.
